name: Etsy sellers processing 10–20 invoices/month tool
description: For Etsy sellers processing 10–20 invoices/month, manual data entry causes time inefficiencies. We automate data extraction instead of manual entry into accounting software.
problem_solved: Manual data entry is time-consuming and error-prone.

locked_fields.primary_problem: Manual data entry is time-consuming and error-prone.
locked_fields.mvp_wedge: For Etsy sellers processing 10–20 invoices/month, manual data entry causes time inefficiencies. We automate data extraction instead of manual entry into accounting software.

one_liner: For Etsy sellers processing 10–20 invoices/month, manual data entry causes time inefficiencies. We automate data extraction instead of manual entry into accounting software.
